attempts.reason: The invocation was proxy-routed and its enabled plugin updater cloned a GitHub repository despite the review's no-external-network boundary. The orchestrator interrupted it; it returned no verdict.
Although updater traffic was disabled, the process still loaded the stale user setting ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:47821. It was interrupted and returned no verdict.
The fresh process used the direct Anthropic endpoint but the account session limit had not reset. It returned a 429 and no verdict.

Claude then independently issued a separate noninteractive byte restore, reran the analyzer, matched all six generated reports, and only that explicit retry supports guard_confirmed=true.
